content:
# Vestwell Intern – Engineering Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Vestwell Intern – Engineering internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** <details><summary>**4 locations**</summary>King of Prussia, PA</br>Austin, TX</br>NYC</br>Phoenix, AZ</details>
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Vestwell
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Vestwell is offering a Intern – Engineering internship position in <details><summary>**4 locations**</summary>King of Prussia, PA</br>Austin, TX</br>NYC</br>Phoenix, AZ</details>. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Vestwell's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Vestwell interview and increase your chances of success.
